creator: rew@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to tom+fbsdbugzilla from comment #17)

This might be a duplicate of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=275286

Can you apply the following fix and trigger the panic again?

https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=24346a2f777598272caffbd7e4fb6d85cafe64ed

I was able to open the dump, it was complete. I forgot minidump is turned on by default.
